name: JACKALOPE

abilities.name: Creature of Caerbannog
abilities.text: This model increases its Skl by +1 for every Mutation upgrade attached to it.

abilities.name: Demise (Lamarckian Evolution)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, it may discard a Mutation upgrade to heal 3.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Mutated Maw
actions.effects: If this model has three or more attached Mutation upgrades, this attack deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.

actions.name: Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: Tap the Leyline has a diamond/gem icon before the action name - this appears to be a signature marker, not a soulstone cost. Treated as is_signature: false based on standard icon interpretation (signature is typically a quill/feather icon).
